creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Not sure whether this is a libreoffice or autotools issue.
/usr/local/bin/autom4te-2.69 is present:
# ls /usr/local/bin/autom4te-2.69
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  32210 Dec 27  2013 /usr/local/bin/autom4te-2.69*

# cd /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice
# make configure
